title: 02819_DetectGPT_Zero-Shot_Machine-Generated_Text_Detection_using_Probability_Curvature
positive_examples: DetectGPT improves detection of fake news articles generated by large language models, increasing confidence in the human origin of text consumed by readers and teachers.
The method provides a zero-shot approach to detecting machine-generated text, which can help in educational settings by ensuring fair student assessments.
negative_examples: The use of LLMs for generating content can lead to substantial factual errors in articles, impairing the quality of information available to the public.
LLMs may replace human labor in contexts like student essay writing and journalism, making fair assessment difficult and potentially leading to job displacement.
